metadata.method: 500 role-relevant employers aggregated from current Federal Employment Agency listings across systems, application, business/data analysis, ERP, product and IT project searches; staffing agencies are excluded deterministically.
metadata.disclaimer: A current BA vacancy is hiring evidence, not a sponsorship promise. Confirm language, salary, qualification match and visa support on each vacancy.
